title: Balloons Away!
description: Adds cosmetic balloons to the game such as camel balloons and much more!
body:
**FEATURES**
Adds balloons that are animals such as camels, wolves and sniffers!


**CREDITS**
Thanks to sk3llytron for making all the models!
Thanks to the Modfest team for hosting the event!
[Modfest:Carnival](https://modfest.net/carnival)
